name: ibm-iagentx
description: Extends IBM i resources (source members, IFS, SQL, job logs) into VS Code AI agents — GitHub Copilot Chat and Claude Code — via MCP.

ibm-iagentx.sqlMaxRows.description: Default maximum rows returned by ibmi_run_sql (1–1000).

ibm-iagentx.clAllowedPrefixes.description: CL command verb prefixes permitted by ibmi_run_cl_command.

ibm-iagentx.preferredPort.description: Preferred HTTP port for the MCP server (falls back to +4 consecutive ports if busy).

ibm-iagentx.bobAppDataFolder.description: App data folder name used by IBM Bob on this OS (e.g. 'IBMBob'). Leave blank to disable Bob auto-configuration. The full path resolved is: <appData>/<bobAppDataFolder>/User/globalStorage/saoudrizwan.claude-dev/settings/cline_mcp_settings.json

scripts.package: npm run compile && vsce package --readme-path MARKETPLACE.md
scripts.publish: npm run compile && vsce publish --readme-path MARKETPLACE.md
